title: Antifa - Schulter an Schulter, wo der Staat versagte
original_title: Antifa - Schulter an Schulter, wo der Staat versagte
overview: For the first time, five Antifa activists talk in detail about the background and practices of an unusually professional movement that countered the flourishing neo-Nazi scene in reunified Germany after 1989.
